description: The Cashaw from rockport is a great sneaker to don on a casual day when you have nothing much to do and just kick around. Engineered with a lace-up front and created with a cow napa leather upper, the Cashaw range of shoes retains the original rugged look of the hide, while it's also easy to maintain and has an extended life span. In fact, the cow napa leather and fabric lining combination absorbs moisture keeping the feet dry and also prevents abrasion. Team this with denims and polo tees for that completely casual look.Upper Waxed suede upper with leather lining for added  strength and durability and natural look of the hide Light in weight for ultimate comfort in walking long distances Lace-up closure with padded collar for secure and comfortable Fit Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Elongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug fit and added ventilation Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane (PU) for long term  wear Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Textile insole for ventilation and sweat absorption Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned  comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and  enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Low heeled sole for better grip Flex grooves and circular lugs provide durable grip on various surfaces Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Moisture absorbent, odour resistant cushioning keeps feet dry and comfortable AdiPRENE technology employed in outsole for added cushioning to protect the feet from impact and easier propulsion Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
